calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Spousal Property Petition
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Gregory Resnick (Petitioner).

Ms. Espey stated that she understood that the probate code was very broad and that she was here to ask the Court allow her client to file the petition on behalf of his mother as her Power of Attorney. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Peppina Thompson CSR#7433. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Spousal Property Petition
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Continued To Jun-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Feb-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Petitioner.

Ms. Espey stated that there was conflict regarding Probate Code 13650 and Probate Code 4458. She will file a brief regarding this issue. The matter was continued to February 6, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
